title: Create: Trims
description: Trim your armor with Create's materials
body:
# Create: Trims

Create: Trims lets you trim your armor with [Create's](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) materials. This includes andesite alloy, zinc ingots, brass ingots, polished rose quartz, and nuggets of experience.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/R2hcvYuY/images/1efcb5dce481d5f9426aba00088cdd01d0ba450a.png)

## Supported Mods

- [More Armor Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-trims)
